openingThird.focus: Keep camp handoff and Dragonblight retreat tied to hide, forge, bone-country, and Jaina's bodily counting.

middleThird.focus: Keep ship labor, harbor recall, and framework breakthrough physical rather than essayed.

finalThird.focus: Keep village normalcy, relay timing, palace geometry, and commitment beats specific enough to resist tactical shorthand.

scenes.title: The Handoff
scenes.biggestGap: The camp-to-road handoff occasionally lifts into metaphor or fate-summary instead of staying in hide, tool sound, yard work, and route memory.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Baelgun's yard and the trail back toward Daggercap Bay must stay present as physical thresholds.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Hide flap, forge heat, bread, waterskin, and treatment tools carry the handoff.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina tracks the seam through motion and remembers the harbor through weather-triggered recall.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Baelgun's blunt field talk stays tied to stretcher work, heat, and the camp's immediate labor.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The scene exits on cold, bootfalls, and the counted hitch in Frostmourne's field.

scenes.title: The Return March
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's seam analysis is strong, but several hinge lines turn bodily pattern-work into abstract verdicts instead of keeping it timed through breath, blood, and snow.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Dragonblight's bone-country and the march file have to stay visible around every realization.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Snow, blood, shaking hands, and breath-count rhythm keep the seam embodied.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina thinks in field-pressure and mechanism, but every conclusion must cash out through what her body can count or endure.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Sylvanas's checks on Jaina's condition should stay pinned to gait, hands, and road pace.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The breakthrough must hand directly into the harbor approach through carry-cost, not blur.

scenes.title: Daggercap and the Crossing
scenes.biggestGap: The sea run is well grounded overall, but a few summary lines blur march cost or turn shipboard silence into literary exchange instead of deck reality.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Harbor switchback, ship deck, and Southshore dock must keep the crossing located.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Rope, spray, blood, food, and timbers carry the voyage's cost.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reduces theory into field language because the finding has to survive outside a mage's head.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Shipboard dialogue needs rope, rail, deck, or sail labor close by.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Landfall stays bodily and immediate, with no relief gap before the road.

scenes.title: The Road South
scenes.biggestGap: Sylvanas's road POV mostly stays concrete, but the village lie and relay-hit reaction briefly lift into summary language instead of local false-normal detail and campaign logic.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: King's Road villages and relay traffic must keep false calm tactile and civic.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Garlands, ribbons, hot brass, reins, and road dust ground Sylvanas's anger.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads everything as threat, timing, cover, and cost to Jaina's body.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Village and relay exchanges need immediate road business attached to them.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The stone call should push directly into the capital approach without summary drift.

scenes.title: The Plan and the Capital
scenes.biggestGap: The service-arch sequence is strong, but one late planning paragraph compresses throne-room geometry into note-like shorthand instead of usable marble-space reads.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Service arch, court, corridor, and palace stone must keep the threshold spatially legible.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Lock plate, mortar, marble, door crack, and kitchen wear carry the palace margin.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas translates plan into survivable distance, angles, and exposure.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: The plan talk needs wall, light, lock, and listener reaction beats nearby.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The final threshold lands on the closing service door and the loss of public-facing help.
